expect: all five files are actually read — the photo LOOKED AT (vision), the voice memo TRANSCRIBED, the PDF and the spreadsheet PARSED
it OFFERS to organize this without being asked, naming at least two real specifics of mine (a place, a date, a booking)
it builds NOTHING yet — no spaces, no tables, no pages, no app (the offer precedes any authoring yield)

turns.sent: Ok this is getting out of hand. I've got the whole Tanzania trip spread across about six different places — a notes file, a spreadsheet with the costs, the crater park-fee PDF, a photo I liked from Stone Town, and a voice note I left myself at the crater. Attaching all of it. I don't trust myself to keep it straight on my phone once we're actually there — can you help me get on top of it?
turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":2},"children":["Ok, I've read everything you sent. Here's what you're carrying:"]},{"type":"Callout","props":{"variant":"info","title":"What you handed me"},"children":[{"type":"List","props":{"items":["Tanzania trip notes (tanzaniamemories.md) — itinerary, contacts, logistics, the whole plan.","Trip costs spreadsheet (trip-costs.xlsx) — your budget and actuals.","Ngorongoro park tariff PDF — official fee schedule.","Stone Town photo — a quiet courtyard scene from Zanzibar.","Voice memo from the crater — Emmanuel the driver-guide, Maasai bracelets for Athena Mari (paid ~TZS 35,000), and an unmentioned ranger tip of ~TZS 5,000 you need to ask Richard about."]},"children":[]}]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["This splits naturally into a few distinct parts — Zanzibar (Stone Town), the Ngorongoro crater / safari leg, and the overall trip budget. Each has its own facts, contacts, and things to remember, and the voice memo adds details that aren't in any written file."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["I can ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["pull all of this together"]}," so you can open one page on your phone and see everything — your itinerary, costs, park fees, that photo, and the loose ends from the voice note — instead of digging through six places. Want me to set that up?"]}]}
